description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean white exterior walls and large rectangular windows. The property includes a fenced yard with green grass, several mature trees, and a paved driveway leading to a parked car. The upper floor has a balcony or terrace area with a privacy screen, and there is a small pool or hot tub visible on the side. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entrance is located at the front, adjacent to the driveway, and is marked by a simple door with no porch or overhang. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and open outdoor space.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a fenced yard, and a driveway with a car. The design is minimalist, featuring white walls, a balcony, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Side view showing the upper balcony, pool/hot tub, and the car parked in the driveway with trees and grass in the yard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, driveway, car, and the fenced yard with trees and grass.
description_view_2: Rear side view displaying the asymmetrical window arrangement, fenced yard, and more of the green space and trees.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the plain white wall, fenced yard, and trees, with minimal window openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door adjacent to driveway, no porch or overhang, minimal decorative elements
